sentences.arabic: أُفَضِّلُ اسْتِخْدَامَ الْمِتْرُو لِلتَّنَقُّلِ فِي الْمَدِينَةِ.
sentences.translation: Više volim koristiti metro za kretanje po gradu.
sentences.translationEn: I prefer using the metro to move around the city.

sentences.arabic: التَّذَاكِرُ رَخِيصَةٌ وَالْمِتْرُو يَصِلُ دَائِمًا فِي الْوَقْتِ الْمُحَدَّدِ.
sentences.translation: Karte su jeftine i metro uvijek stiže na vrijeme.
sentences.translationEn: Tickets are cheap and the metro always arrives on time.

sentences.arabic: أَحْيَانًا أَرْكَبُ الْحَافِلَةَ لِأَرَى الشَّوَارِعَ وَالْمَبَانِيَ.
sentences.translation: Ponekad idem autobusom da vidim ulice i zgrade.
sentences.translationEn: Sometimes I take the bus to see the streets and buildings.

sentences.arabic: يَجِبُ عَلَيْكَ شِرَاءُ بِطَاقَةِ النَّقْلِ قَبْلَ الرُّكُوبِ.
sentences.translation: Morate kupiti kartu za prevoz prije vožnje.
sentences.translationEn: You must buy a transport card before riding.

sentences.arabic: هَذِهِ الطَّرِيقَةُ تَمْنَعُ الضَّيَاعَ فِي الزِّحَامِ.
sentences.translation: Ovaj način sprečava gubljenje u gužvi.
sentences.translationEn: This method prevents getting lost in the traffic.
